headline: API, token demand, and model release lead the window while training-free methods break out alongside a wave of cost and quality control entrants.
body: API, token demand, and model release hold the top of the rotation, with training-free techniques and token demand both flagged as breakouts. New entrants cluster around economics and testing: cost analysis, image generation API, automated testing, and quality control, plus prompt injection and data protection on the tooling side. On the interface front, an OpenAI employee declares "Chat is dead" as the company builds a super app, while Notion restored access to Anthropic after a service disruption that drew heavy attention. Several first-person posts examine how code generation and LLMs reshape engineering careers and the ROI of AI coding for bootstrapped founders.

cited_items.title: Notion restores access to Anthropic after service disruption
OpenAI is still working on that ‘super app’
The ROI of AI coding looks different when you are a bootstrapped founder
LLMs are eroding my software engineering career and I don't know what to do
